name: maxiedit
description: MaxiEdit Android app — Capacitor wrapper around the web prototype

scripts.sync:www: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp index.html www/index.html
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run sync:www && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
